rationale: Falling oil prices from the US-Iran ceasefire announcement offer mild relief for Portuguese energy and transport costs; no other headlines directly affect Portugal this cycle.

top_events.title: US-Iran deal announced; oil prices slide
top_events.summary: Falling oil prices provide mild relief for Portuguese fuel and energy costs, supporting the tourism-dependent economy. Deal not yet signed — continuation of prior dynamic.

top_events.title: Tourist train overturns, injures 17 at Cártama tapas festival
top_events.summary: Incident in neighbouring Spain at a tourist event — minor relevance for Portuguese tourism safety awareness, no direct impact on Portugal.

top_events.title: UK and Japan agree £18bn investment deal
top_events.summary: Large UK-Japan trade deal has negligible direct impact on Portugal but reflects broader Western economic activity relevant to EU trade environment.
